## Epic: TH1-E5 — Developer skill & test infra

The inward-facing discipline: the `run-tests.sh` dispatcher, the five-category test
suites, and the `copilotcockpit-dev` GitOps delivery runbook skill.

### Stories

- [ ] US1 — `run-tests.sh` dispatcher + Category-1 `bats` unit tests for `cmd-*.sh`.
- [ ] US2 — Categories 2–4: template integrity, skills lint & integration smoke.
- [ ] US3 — `skills/copilotcockpit-dev/SKILL.md`: GitOps delivery runbook (8th skill).

Full stories: `docs/themes/TH1-bootstrap-tooling/E5-dev-skill-test-infra/`
